{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144155F20DD422A00F28E29590"}"},"total":2682},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7217509772403393283","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真正的穿越爽文，比那些爹窝囊娘窝囊的虐文好看百倍，赞一个[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680458075,"group_id":"7202523008362089504","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N86S2q/RhPTuOYnB4CeSelDLEvL7/5dV5WYG+arDe2I/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3808341672854606","user_name":"用户38083416"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3808341672854606","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7202523008362089504","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：《空间+种田+穿越+虐渣+打脸+医女+女强男强》有随身空间的特种兵夏水灵，执行任务时出了意外，穿越到医女身上。穿越也就算了，在躲避暴雨的山洞里，她遇到了一个很麻烦的受伤王爷。下山后，还有极品亲戚。她帮助邻居，带着全家发家致富，帮助在山洞里偶遇的王爷平定战乱，让国人有个安宁的家。这期间，她结识了天下第一大帮的帮主莫洛离，他对她宠爱有加。
面对王爷强取豪夺的报恩方式，现在灵魂的夏水灵，该作何选择？
他报答的方式竟然是想娶她，让她当皇后。但他的霸道，能让现代灵魂的女子接受吗？水灵的情感何去何从？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/851e00ce7e704dec5bb2c86118a19515","author":"笑看流年","author_id":"","book_id":"7202523008362089504","book_name":"特种兵穿越，开局救个王爷","book_short_name":"皇宫囚不住","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7202523724573049376","read_count":"33730","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1001813"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"480","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,空间,女强,虐渣,今穿古,强强,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ad21aa4185d5273c6ad322b61e5d75cd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259315&x-signature=vSIIzUniRc1aotnnLxoocpbinkQ%3D","tomato_bo
